title: auto Sprintmod
description: This mod lets you automatically sprint when you have enough hunger (toggleable via a key)
body:
# Auto-sprint

Auto-sprint for Minecraft 1.21.11 (Fabric). The player automatically sprints as long as the mod is active and there is enough hunger.

## Features
- Hotkey to turn on/off (default: Y)
- Status display in the action bar when switching (ON/OFF)
- Status is retained after restart
- Sprint only when hunger level >= 7
